title: I Never Met the Dead Man // Do You Believe in Dog?
description: Peter teaches Meg to drive and immediately turns the town's satellite dish into scrap metal. That's the real episode. What we actually talk about: an AI that tried to summarize the season for us and just started inventing cults out of thin air, Jedi semen retention, Al Pacino (briefly), and so many stories about convertibles it'll make your head spin.

title: Death Has a Shadow // We Cranked Our Hogs Pretty Hard
description: The format is introduced and immediately derailed. Stewie Gay Watch officially launches (verdict: not yet). Tyler reveals he watched the original broadcast as an 8-year-old. Collin did not see it until middle school and we judge him for it. Jason plays the theme song entirely too loud. The hogs are cranked. 461 episodes remaining.
